notes: STM32-style block diagram with a large chip boundary and legend for analog power domains.
Includes CPU, SWD, bus matrix, DMA/DMAMUX, flash/SRAM, RCC, clock sources, power/supply supervision, GPIO ports, APB/AHB buses, ADC, SPI/I2S, timers, USART, I2C, RTC, watchdogs, and debug blocks.
Useful for validating color swatches/legends, translucent domain overlays, bus spines, external edge pins, small interface blocks, and mixed horizontal/vertical labels.
